title: malvastrum hornschuchianum
intro: Malvastrum hornschuchianum, also known as Mexican hibiscus, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family, characterized by its showy flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malvastrum hornschuchianum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Malvastrum hornschuchianum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often consumed raw in salads or as a cooked green.
